---
title: "The Living SEB project"
description: "A living database for SEB research."
date: 2025-12-01
Method: [database]
categories: [review, meta-analysis, SEB]
---

## Overview

The **Living SEB Project** (<https://github.com/feracotommaso/living_SEB_review>) is an open, continuously updated research initiative that compiles and synthesizes all available **cross-sectional studies** on Strength–Emotion–Behavior (SEB) associations.\
Its goal is to create a transparent, reproducible, and dynamic evidence base that evolves as new research emerges.

The project provides access to a *living database*, a suite of analytic tools, a public preregistration, and a detailed methodological paper explaining the full workflow. It is designed to support researchers, students, and meta-analysts who need reliable, continually updated evidence from the SEB literature.

## What the project includes

-   **A curated, living database** of SEB studies
-   **Fully reproducible effect-size extraction pipeline**
-   **A continuously updated synthesis** of SEB associations
-   **Interactive tools** for exploring and analysing the evidence
-   **Open access materials** including preregistrations, papers, and presentations

## Core Resources

-   📄 **Living SEB Paper\
    **Full methodological and empirical description of the project.
    -   **Official preprint** ([pdf](https://doi.org/10.31234/osf.io/ewvuf_v1))
-   📄 **Living Results \
    **Description of the current database and monthly updated results.
    -   **Living results** ([html](https://feracotommaso.github.io/living_SEB_review/paper/livingSEBresults.html))
-   **📊 Living SEB App\
    **Interactive Shiny app for browsing studies and running meta-analyses.
    -   **App** [link](https://feracoshiny.shinyapps.io/livingSEBapp/)
    -   **User manual ([PDF](https://feracotommaso.github.io/living_SEB_review/appManual/livingSEBapp_manual.pdf))**
-   📝 **Preregistration\
    **Full preregistration protocol of the Living SEB workflow ([PDF](https://feracotommaso.github.io/living_SEB_review/preregistration/Preregistration_protocol_livingSEB.pdf)).
-   🎤 **Presentations**
    -   **IBT Colloquium** • 2025-09-17 ([slides](https://feracotommaso.github.io/living_SEB_review/slides/IBTcolloquium/IBTcolloquium.html#/title-slide))
    -   **Lab Meeting •** 2025-10-13 ([slides](https://feracotommaso.github.io/living_SEB_review/slides/labMeeting/LabMeetingLMA.html))

## Why a “Living” approach?

Traditional meta-analyses quickly become outdated as new studies accumulate.\
The Living SEB Project uses a *living evidence* workflow — an approach that ensures:

-   rapid integration of new findings
-   fully reproducible synthesis pipelines
-   transparent tracking of updates
-   continuous availability of up-to-date results

This allows the SEB literature to remain **current, cumulative, and open** for researchers and practitioners.
